description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The headband and ear cup exteriors are finished in a matte orange color, while the ear pads themselves are a dark gray, likely made of a soft, comfortable material. The headphones feature a classic, symmetrical design with visible hinges connecting the ear cups to the headband, allowing for some adjustability. The overall build appears sturdy, with a combination of plastic and metal components for durability and flexibility. The ear cups are thick and well-padded, suggesting good noise isolation and comfort for extended use. There are no visible wires, controls, or branding, indicating a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with a matte orange headband and large, dark gray cushioned ear cups. The design is sturdy, comfortable, and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, dark gray ear cups and the full arch of the orange headband.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the width of the headband and the circular shape of the ear cups.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both ear cups and the headband visible, but no controls or branding.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the base of the ear cups.
